labels.profile_status_default: Hey there! I am using Hum.

activate.title: Activate payments
activate.description: Set up your Lightning wallet to start sending and receiving sats.

write_down.title: Write down your recovery phrase
write_down.subtitle: Store these 12 words safely. They are the only way to recover your wallet.

confirm.title: Confirm your recovery phrase
confirm.subtitle: Retype the 12 words to make sure you saved them correctly.

activate.security_note: Never share these words with anyone. Anyone with this phrase can access your funds.
activate.self_custody_warning: Hum cannot recover your wallet. Store these words safely offline—if you lose them, your sats are gone.

confirmation.prompt: Retype your 12-word recovery phrase to confirm.
confirmation.helper: Enter the words in order. Suggestions appear after a few letters. {{remaining}} left.
confirmation.invalid_word: “{{word}}” does not match word {{expected}}. Check your spelling.

balance.title: Wallet balance
balance.empty: No balance yet. Activate payments to start receiving sats.

history.title: Recent activity
history.empty: No transactions yet. Your history will appear here once you start transacting.

errors.title: Unable to load payments
errors.missing_api_key: Payments are disabled because no Breez API key was provided.
errors.generic: Something went wrong while loading payments.

text_size.label: Text size
text_size.preview_body: This is an example paragraph showing how app text scales.
